recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Pick-up Artist
recommendations.overview: A womanizer meets his match when he falls for the daughter of a gambling addict who is in debt to the mob.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Past Lives
recommendations.overview: After decades apart, childhood friends Nora and Hae Sung are reunited in New York for one fateful weekend as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: The Story of the Last Chrysanthemum
recommendations.overview: In late 19th-century Tokyo, Kikunosuke Onoue, the adopted son of a legendary actor, himself an actor specializing in female roles, discovers that the praise he receives is only due to his status as his father's heir. Devastated, he turns to Otoku, a

recommendations.title: The Goodbye Girl
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her live-in boyfriend, an unemployed dancer and her 10-year-old daughter are reluctantly forced to live with a struggling off-Broadway actor.
